backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (ContactInquiry, PsychometricTestBooking, CounselingSessionBooking, UserProfile) and CRUD functions with authorization checks using MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the logo replacement feature with high confidence, listing affected components and test ID REQ-15.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including pages, forms, hooks, layout components, and configuration files with details about routing, styling, and WhatsApp integration.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space with warm amber/orange palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with document title "The Smart Choice" and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for Home, Psychometric Test, Counseling, and Contact pages wrapped in SiteLayout.
frontend/src/components/forms/ContactInq: Contact inquiry form with validation for name, grade, contact details, preferred method, and message; handles submission via mutation hook with success/error states.
frontend/src/components/forms/Counseling: Counseling session booking form with validation for student/parent details, session mode (online/in-person), date/time preferences, and backend integration via mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/forms/Psychometr: Form component for booking psychometric tests with validation for name, grade, contact info, preferred date/time, and notes. Displays pricing callout and uses mutation hook to submit bookings, showing success state via SubmissionStatePanel.
frontend/src/components/forms/Submission: Reusable UI component that displays loading, success, or error states for form submissions with appropriate icons, messages, and optional reset button.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Main layout component with sticky header, responsive navigation (desktop/mobile menu), footer with brand info and links, and WhatsApp floating button integration.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloating: Fixed floating action button component linking to WhatsApp Click-to-Chat with phone number 919811575100 and prefilled message, styled with WhatsApp brand green.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports brand name constants: 'The Smart Choice' and its lowercase variant for consistent branding across the application.
frontend/src/hooks/mutations/useSubmitCo: React Query mutation hook for submitting contact inquiries with fields like name, grade, contact method, and message, invalidating related queries on success.
React Query mutation hook for submitting counseling session bookings with details including preferred date, time, mode, and participant info.
frontend/src/hooks/mutations/useSubmitPs: React Query mutation hook for submitting psychometric test bookings with student details, preferred scheduling, and notes, invalidating cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors (background, foreground, primary, accent, etc.) using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page component with a hero section, contact information cards (email, phone, location), and a scrollable contact inquiry form. Uses lucide-react icons and gradient styling with amber/orange theme.
frontend/src/pages/CounselingPage.tsx: Counseling booking page featuring a hero section with background pattern, session details (personal attention, flexible scheduling, online/in-person options, 60-minute sessions), and a scrollable booking form. Uses amber/orange gradient theme.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section promoting educational counseling services, featuring three main service cards (Contact, Psychometric Test, 1:1 Counseling) with navigation buttons. Includes hero illustration and uses TanStack Router for navigation.
Psychometric test booking page with hero section showing pricing (Rs. 749 intro offer), test benefits explanation, and feature grid highlighting strengths identification and cognitive assessment. Includes scrollable booking form with amber/orange theme.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for URL parameter management supporting both hash-based and browser routing. Provides functions to extract, persist, and clear URL parameters using sessionStorage, with special handling for hash-based query strings.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom theme extensions including Inter font family, OKLCH-based color system with CSS variables for theming (primary, secondary, destructive, muted, accent, sidebar, chart colors), custom border radius, box shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for "The Smart Choice" education counseling website (version 13) targeting Indian grade 8-10 students and parents, listing implemented features including contact forms, psychometric test booking, 1:1 counseling booking, backend integration with React Query, visual theming, and image requirements for brand logo replacement.
